userMessage: Add frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1 and query both results

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Frequency and Amplitude Measurements","description":"Clears existing measurements, adds Frequency and Amplitude on CH1, then queries both current-acquisition results.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Add Measurements","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Clear existing measurements so MEAS1 and MEAS2 are assigned deterministically."}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Clear Measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Add CH1 Frequency and Amplitude","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY; MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS AMPLITUDE; MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"s6","type":"sleep","label":"Sleep","params":{"duration":0.5}},{"id":"s7","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}}]},{"id":"g8","type":"group","label":"Read Results","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s9","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Frequency","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"s10","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Amplitude","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}}]},{"id":"s11","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}

flow.name: CH1 Frequency and Amplitude Measurements
flow.description: Clears existing measurements, adds Frequency and Amplitude on CH1, then queries both current-acquisition results.

params.text: Clear existing measurements so MEAS1 and MEAS2 are assigned deterministically.
